title: invitations — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: OpenTelemetry / Prometheus metrics this module emits. RED pattern for send + accept surfaces; funnel counters mirror the analytics.json event names but at the ops / SLO level (i.e. not gated by user consent).

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.bounced.total
metrics.description: hard / soft / complaint distribution — feeds deliverability dashboards.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.pending
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of non-terminal invitations. Sampled every 60s.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.accept.duration_ms
metrics.description: POST /api/invitations/{token}/accept duration — includes the target-handler runtime.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.acceptance_rate
metrics.description: Rolling 30d (accepted / sent). SLO target: >0.6 for owner-role invitations, >0.4 overall.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.bounce_rate
metrics.description: Rolling 30d (bounced / sent). SLO target: <0.02. Alerts fire above 0.05.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.rate_limit_exceeded.total
metrics.description: Counter of 429 responses from `throttle.invitations`. Dimension is the counter that tripped: inviter_user / inviter_service_account / tenant / invitee_email.

metrics.name: stackra.invitations.webhook.signature_failed.total
metrics.description: Signature verification failures. High volume = likely attack; alerts fire.
